name: ClipDrop
description: AI image editing suite from Stability AI for background removal with edge detection, upscaling to 4x, relighting simulating studio lighting, cleanup tools. API available. Free daily credits. For e-commerce product photos.
shortDesc: AI image editing for bg removal and upscaling

name: Remove.bg
description: Specialized AI background removal with pixel-perfect precision. Deep learning detects people, products, animals, cars. API handles batch processing. Multiple output formats including transparent PNG.

name: Let's Enhance
description: AI image upscaler adding realistic detail via deep learning. Upscales to 16x with texture preservation. Color correction, face enhancement, sharpening for print. Batch processing. Photo restoration and print-ready.
shortDesc: AI image upscaler adding realistic detail

name: Krea AI
description: Real-time AI image and video generation with instant preview. Excels at patterns, textures, design assets. Real-time canvas for rapid prototyping. Community marketplace for sharing. Easy for beginners and pros.
shortDesc: Real-time AI image generation with preview

name: Playground AI
description: Free AI image gen with Stable Diffusion and visual editor. Prompt weighting, negative prompts, seed control, canvas inpainting/outpainting, image-to-image. Community gallery. Free daily credits.
shortDesc: Free AI image generator with editing tools

name: Pixlr AI
description: Browser-based image editor with AI generative fill for adding/removing objects, background removal, smart cutout, one-click color. Photoshop alternative in browser. Template library for social and marketing.
shortDesc: Browser AI photo editor with generative fill

name: Magnific AI
description: Advanced AI upscaler adding incredible detail at 8K. Generative AI creates realistic new detail beyond interpolation. Creative enhancement, face restoration, batch. Paid-only with credits.

name: Getimg.ai
description: All-in-one AI image toolkit: text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, outpainting, upscaling. Stable Diffusion with custom model training. API for automation. Multiple SD versions.

name: Facet AI
description: Precision AI image editor for professional designers. AI background removal, subject selection, object replacement with non-destructive editing. Layers, masks, real-time collaboration. For photographers.

name: NightCafe
description: Multi-algorithm AI art supporting Stable Diffusion, DALL-E. Text-to-image, style transfer, preset styles. Active community with daily challenges. Credit system with free daily credits. Beginner-friendly.

name: Stability AI API
description: Official API for Stable Diffusion 3, SDXL, video, 3D, audio. Developer docs, SDKs, batch processing, enterprise scalability. Pay-per-generation. For developers integrating AI image generation.
